message:
fix(stream,net): fail-closed repoll hardening for stream combinators and Happy Eyeballs

Replace stale-result replay with assert-based fail-closed behavior in
Take, TakeWhile, Any, All, Count, ForEach, ForEachAsync, Scan, and Zip
stream combinators. Add RaceConnections completion tracking in Happy
Eyeballs with resource cleanup on terminal outcome. All changes include
focused regression tests for post-completion repoll behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
